clips.title: The Lake
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A still mountain lake at dawn, mirror-flat water, soft mist, pastel sky, distant pines. A person sits cross-legged on a wooden dock meditating, calm and serene, eyes closed, breathing slow. A person in soft loungewear. Soft dawn light, gentle mist, peaceful mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Hammock
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A lush green garden in dappled afternoon light, a hammock strung between two trees, gentle breeze. A person lies in the hammock utterly relaxed and peaceful, eyes half-closed, a soft smile. A person in light summer clothes. Warm dappled light, gentle sway, peaceful mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Morning
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A misty park at dawn, soft light through trees, dew on the grass. A person moves slowly through a calm tai chi pose, serene and centered, unhurried and graceful. A person in loose comfortable clothes. Soft misty dawn light, peaceful mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Nook
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A cozy sunlit window nook with cushions and plants, soft afternoon light. A person curls up reading a book, deeply peaceful and content, relaxed shoulders, a gentle expression. A person in a soft sweater. Warm soft window light, peaceful mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Garden
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A tranquil zen garden, raked sand, mossy stones, a small maple, soft light. A person walks slowly and mindfully along the path, calm and serene, at peace. A person in simple linen clothes. Soft even light, peaceful mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Float
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, serene grade. A calm turquoise sea or quiet pool under soft daylight, gentle ripples. A person floats on their back on the calm water, arms out, utterly peaceful and weightless, eyes closed. A person in swimwear. Soft bright light, gentle water, peaceful mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.
